sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 로우즈는 2026년 5월 1일 분기 매출 230억 7,800만 달러를 기록하며 기술 현대화 투자를 지속하고 있습니다.

keyPoints.text: 다년간의 기술 전환 프로젝트를 통해 유통 및 보충 시스템을 현대화하고 있으며, 이는 향후 몇 년간 지속될 예정입니다.
회계 및 재무 시스템 업데이트를 포함한 인프라 개선 작업이 진행 중이며, 이에 따른 내부 통제 설계 및 구현을 지속적으로 평가하고 있습니다.

riskChanges.text: 금리 변동, 운송 비용, 원자재 가격 변화 등 시장 리스크에 노출되어 있으며, 이는 이전 연례 보고서와 비교하여 중대한 변화가 없습니다.
기술 전환 과정에서 발생하는 시스템 업데이트가 재무 보고 내부 통제에 미칠 잠재적 영향에 대해 지속적인 모니터링이 요구됩니다.

businessChanges.text: 유통 및 보충 시스템의 현대화를 포함한 다년간의 기술 전환을 추진하여 운영 효율성 제고를 도모하고 있습니다.
분기 중 재무 보고 내부 통제에 중대한 영향을 미치거나 미칠 가능성이 있는 변경 사항은 발생하지 않았습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 당기 매출은 230억 7,800만 달러, 영업이익은 25억 5,400만 달러, 순이익은 16억 2,800만 달러를 기록했습니다.
총자산은 549억 4,100만 달러이며, 현금 및 현금성 자산은 7억 8,600만 달러를 보유하고 있습니다.

watchItems.text: 대규모 기술 전환 프로젝트가 향후 수년간 지속됨에 따라, 시스템 통합 과정에서의 운영 리스크 관리와 자본 지출 효율성이 실적의 핵심 변수가 될 것입니다.

Quarter ended 2026-05-01 operating income = 25억 5,400만 달러 (USD 2.554B; 2,554 million), XBRL range 2026-01-31..2026-05-01.
Quarter ended 2026-05-01 net income = 16억 2,800만 달러 (USD 1.628B; 1,628 million), XBRL range 2026-01-31..2026-05-01.
Quarter ended 2026-05-01 total assets = 549억 4,100만 달러 (USD 54.941B; 54,941 million), XBRL range instant..2026-05-01.
Quarter ended 2026-05-01 cash and cash equivalents = 7억 8,600만 달러 (USD 0.786B; 786 million), XBRL range instant..2026-05-01.

Our significant and critical accounting policies and estimates have not changed significantly since the filing of the Annual Report. Item 3. - Quantitative and Qualitative Disclosures about Market Risk The Company is exposed to certain market risks, including changes in interest rates, transportation costs, and commodity prices. The Company’s market risks have not changed materially from those disclosed in the Annual Report for the fiscal year ended January 30, 2026. Results of Operations” in the Annual Report. Our significant and critical accounting policies and estimates have not changed significantly since the filing of the Annual Report. Item 3. - Quantitative and Qualitative Disclosures about Market Risk The Company is exposed to certain market risks, including changes in interest rates, transportation costs, and commodity prices. The Company’s market risks have not changed materially from those disclosed in the Annual Report for the fiscal year ended January 30, 2026. Item 4. - Controls and Procedures The Company’s management, with the participation of the Chief Executive Officer and the Chief Financial Officer, has evaluated the effectiveness of the Company’s “disclosure controls and procedures,” (as such term is defined in Rule 13a-15(e) 22 Table of Contents promulgated under the Securities Exchange Act of 1934, as amended (the Exchange Act))

Securities Exchange Act of 1934, as amended (the Exchange Act)). Based upon their evaluation, the Chief Executive Officer and the Chief Financial Officer concluded that, as of May 1, 2026, the Company’s disclosure controls and procedures were effective for the purpose of ensuring that the information required to be disclosed in the reports that the Company files or submits under the Exchange Act with the SEC (1) is recorded, processed, summarized, and reported within the time periods specified in the SEC’s rules and forms, and (2) is accumulated and communicated to the Company’s management, including its principal executive and principal financial officers, as appropriate to allow timely decisions regarding required disclosure. The Company is undergoing a multi-year technology transformation which includes updating and modernizing our distribution and replenishment systems, as well as c

ertain accounting and finance systems. These updates are expected to continue for the next few years, and management will continue to evaluate the design and implementation of the Company’s internal controls over financial reporting as the transformation continues. No change in the Company’s internal control over financial reporting occurred during the quarter ended May 1, 2026, that has materially affected, or is reasonably likely to materially affect, the Company’s internal control over financial reporting. 23 Table of Contents
